name: fit-trackr
description: FitTrackr — social fitness-tracking platform (MERN scenario for DevSim)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.test:tasks:l1: npm run test:task:client:l1:t1 && npm run test:task:client:l1:t2
scripts.test:tasks:l2: npm run test:task:client:l2:t1 && npm run test:task:client:l2:t2
scripts.test:tasks:l3: npm run test:task:server:l3:t1 && npm run test:task:server:l3:t2
scripts.test:tasks:l4: npm run test:task:server:l4:t1 && npm run test:task:server:l4:t2 && npm run test:task:client:l4:t1 && npm run test:task:client:l4:t2
scripts.test:tasks:l5: npm run test:task:server:l5:t1 && npm run test:task:server:l5:t2
